s: a dictionary app for Free Dictionary API and Wiktionary API
d:
freeDictionaryApp is an android dictionary for Free Dictionary API and Wiktionary API. You can just use the search input to search the word. Features
  1. English to English dictionary
  2. Supports multiple languages to English using Wiktionary API (case-sensitive)
  3. Definition of the word
  4. Example of the word usage if available
  5. Synonyms/Antonyms of the work if available
  6. Pronunciation of the word, both IPA text and audio using TTS
  7. Save searched data for offline uses
  8. Search for a random word
